name: Fabric Colorblock Shower Curtain Tan - Room Essentials™
description:
Update your bathroom's ambience with this CVC Fabric Colorblock Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™. This decorative shower curtain features a colorblock design in white, brown, light blue, navy and green hues for contemporary style. Made from recycled polyester-cotton blend CVC fabric, this printed shower curtain features a buttonhole top for quick installation, while the machine-washable design allows for easy cleaning when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
